rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Runscripthelper.exe
id: eca49c87-8a75-4f13-9c73-a5a29e845f03
status: test
description: Detects execution of powershell scripts via Runscripthelper.exe
references:
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Runscripthelper/
author: Victor Sergeev, oscd.community
date: 2020-10-09
modified: 2022-07-11
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1202
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \Runscripthelper.exe
    CommandLine|contains: surfacecheck
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
